zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Bardolf於1274年出生在英國素可波尼斯時，她的父親Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph15歲，母親Isabel d'Aguillon16歲。她於1298年6月8日之前與Michael Poynings在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年2月24日在英國享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Bardolf于1274年出生在英国素可波尼斯时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph15岁，母亲Isabel d'Aguillon16岁。她于1298年6月8日之前与Michael Poynings在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年2月24日在英国享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Bardolf was born in 1274, in Poynings, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, was 15 and her mother, Isabel d'Aguillon, was 16. She married Michael Poynings before 8 June 1298, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 24 February 1334, in England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Bardolf est née en 1274, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Isabel d'Aguillon, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Michael Poynings avant 8 juin 1298, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 février 1334, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Bardolf 1274 in Poynings, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph 15 und ihre Mutter Isabel d'Aguillon 16. Sie hat vor 8. Juni 1298 in England Michael Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Februar 1334 im Alter von 60 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Bardolf è nata il nel 1274 nel Poynings, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Isabel d'Aguillon, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Michael Poynings prima del 8 giugno 1298, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 febbraio 1334, nel England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Bardolfが1274年にイギリススセックスポイニングズで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolphは15歳，母Isabel d'Aguillonは16歳であった。1298年6月8日以前にイギリスでMichael Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年2月24日にイギリスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Bardolf(이)가 1274년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel d'Aguillon(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1298년 6월 8일 이전 영국에서 Michael Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 2월 24일 영국에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Bardolf nasceu em 1274, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Isabel d'Aguillon, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael Poynings antes 8 de junho de 1298, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1334, em Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Bardolf родилась в 1274 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel d'Aguillon, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael Poynings перед 8 июнь 1298 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 февраля 1334 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Bardolf nació en 1274, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Isabel d'Aguillon, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Michael Poynings antes de 8 de junio de 1298, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1334, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
